projects.title: Daily Motivation Quotes App
projects.description: Create a mobile app that displays random motivational quotes with a beautiful, themed UI and simple sharing functionality.

projects.title: Personal Inventory Tracker
projects.description: Build an app to track personal belongings or collections, featuring image uploads, category sorting, and local data persistence.

projects.title: Travel Photo Journal
projects.description: Develop a location-aware photo journal that records travel memories with images, notes, and geographic coordinates using device APIs.
